title: Shop pages: catalog, product card, cart, checkout, order status
description: Public shop pages with SSR, SEO, Schema.org. Cart is CSR. Checkout integrates with CDEK pickup points and YooMoney redirect.

pages./products: SSR, useAsyncData, cursor pagination, filter by ?category=slug, usePageSeo, BreadcrumbList, canonical without sort/page
pages./products/[slug]: SSR, Schema.org Product+Offer, img with alt/width/height/loading=lazy/srcset 480w/800w/1200w, hero loading=eager fetchpriority=high, cartStore.addItem(), variant switcher
pages./cart: CSR, cartStore, qty stepper, remove, total + delivery estimate
pages./checkout: Steps: 1.Address+delivery 2.Confirm 3.Payment. CDEK PVZ from /api/v1/delivery/pickup-points. POST /api/v1/orders -> redirect to confirmation_url
pages./orders/[id]: SSR, status polling every 30sec, progress bar: Pending->Paid->Processing->Shipped->Delivered

components: ProductCard.vue — name, price, image(lazy), add-to-cart button
contracts: useSeoMeta + canonical on every public page
Stock info — separate request, does NOT block SSR
acceptance_criteria: /products — SSR, SEO canonical, cursor pagination works
